report_name: CISA to Finalize CIRCIA Rule by September 2026, Mandating 72-Hour Breach and 24-Hour Ransom Payment Reporting

identities.name: Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency
identities.description: The U.S. government agency responsible for finalizing and enforcing the Cyber Incident Reporting for Critical Infrastructure Act (CIRCIA).

identities.name: U.S. Department of Defense
identities.description: Mentioned in the context of its Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification (CMMC) as part of a broader trend of federal cybersecurity mandates.

identities.name: SolarWinds
identities.description: A major past cyber incident mentioned as a key motivator for the creation of the CIRCIA regulation.
